who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual timesheet errors cause payroll discrepancies. We provide payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Discrepancies in payroll calculations due to manual timesheet errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers posts about payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums for HR management tools
try_it: Let users try timesheet monitoring and alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
